Functions
fza_fnc_setMultiArrayVariable
Description

Sets a value in a 2D (nested) array variable stored on an object.

Parameters
_heli

The object [Unit]

_variableName

Variable name [String]

_index0

Outer array index [Number]

_index1

Inner array index [Number]

_value

Value to set [Any]

_public

Broadcast to network (optional, default false) [Bool]

Returns

Nothing

Examples

[_heli, "fza_sfmplus_rotorBladeAzimuth", 0, 2, 45.0] call fza_fnc_setMultiArrayVariable;

Author

BradMick
